comment: Soft caps from the legacy 7-agent pipeline (worker/planner/reviewer/etc.). As of the 2026-05 single-agent pivot the active scheduled task is `replyai-autopilot` only and its budget lives in ~/.claude/scheduled-tasks/replyai-autopilot/SKILL.md (out-of-tree); these per-role caps are reference-only until the multi-agent pipeline is reactivated. Violations historically aborted the run with a log entry, they didn't fail loudly. Tune these once the team's pain threshold reveals itself.
